symptom_vector: high JVM latency with elevated request latency and JVM response delay

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: adservice 组件因 Byteman 代理重复加载失败并注入 AdService-getRandomAds-latency-1749546648 延迟规则，导致 adservice-getRandomAds-latency 和 rrt 指标异常飙升
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 adservice 的 rrt 指标从 3081.34 激增至 161041.4，rrt_max 从 43075.0 增至 349903.0，表明服务响应延迟严重恶化
Step 2: 分析 adservice 日志发现 Byteman 代理重复加载失败（'attempting to load Byteman agent more than once'）和 AdService-getRandomAds-latency-1749546648 规则注入记录
Step 3: 确认调用链中 frontend->adservice 调用出现 context deadline exceeded 错误，平均延迟从 5.5秒激增至 339秒，验证了延迟问题的级联影响

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains AdService-getRandomAds-latency-1749546648 execute() and rule injection messages
critical_checks.instruction: 在 adservice 日志中搜索 AdService-getRandomAds-latency-1749546648 相关规则执行和注入记录

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains context deadline exceeded error messages
critical_checks.instruction: 在 frontend 和 adservice 日志中搜索 deadline exceeded 相关错误信息

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains InvocationTargetException and Byteman agent failed to start messages
critical_checks.instruction: 在 adservice 日志中搜索 InvocationTargetException 和 Byteman 代理启动失败记录

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains Transformer and RuleTriggerMethodAdapter injection messages
critical_checks.instruction: 在 adservice 日志中搜索 Transformer 和 RuleTriggerMethodAdapter 相关的规则注入记录

critical_checks.expected_pattern: frontend->adservice calls show extreme latency increase and context deadline exceeded errors
critical_checks.instruction: 分析调用链中 frontend 到 adservice 的调用延迟和错误状态，特别是 hipstershop.AdService/GetAds 操作
检查 adservice 的 rrt 指标是否出现异常飙升
检查 adservice 的 rrt_max 指标是否达到异常峰值
